.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(29, 37, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.clickable-icon::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.clickable-icon::before.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.clickable-icon.graph-controls-button::b.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.clickable-icon.graph-controls-button::b.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.file-embed.background: rgb(29, 37, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(68, 158, 248, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-file-title::before.background: rgb(77, 166, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(29, 37, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(68, 158, 248, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(40, 47, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(29, 37, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote::before.background: rgb(67, 159, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
blockquote::before.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1), color-mix(in srgb, hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1), color-mix(in srgb, hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1) 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(29, 37, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(29, 37, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(77, 166, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(29, 37, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
